> ● The following text has been human translated, primarily provided by B.I.A.V. Studio.
>   ○ Awakener Lines: All Awakeners' voice lines and battle interaction lines from "Traphase". About 65% of all Communicator dialogues.
>    ○ "Main Story": All content from "Prologue of Faded Legacy" to "Final Chapter of Faded Legacy", as well as all content from "Chapter 3 of Astral Reign" and "Chapter 4 of Astral Reign".

embeds.title: My Card Is Better Than Your Card!
embeds.description: My Card Is Better Than Your Card\! is an adorable yet challenging sticker sticking roguelike deckbuilder\. Create your own cards with a colorful catalogue of stickers combining their effects\. Collect more and more stickers, discover synergies and find your own playstyle with a deck full of your own

content: It's a point-based deck builder (like balatro), but your deck consist of blank cards and stickers with effect, you can combine stickers however you like, so you can make stupid cards with 10+ effects (that also cost 10+ energies)
